title: Endermen Overhauls
description: Retextures Endermen from other mods into the style of Enderman Overhaul
body:
# About:
This **resource pack** attempts to extend the art style of Enderman Overhaul to other endermen or enderbeings from other mods. This is an interpretation of the art style and not in any way official. You could add this resource pack without needing to install Endermen Overhaul but why would you not?

This resource pack may work on lower versions but I just don't feel like tweaking it for lower versions for now

# Tweaks:
**Current Tweaks:**
- Mutant Enderman from [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters)
- Enderman Head from [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries])

**Planned Tweaks (not yet available):**
- Every endermob from [The Farlanders](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-farlanders)
- Tweak the Mutant Enderman's death

10/21/2025: other planned tweaks won't happen so thus it'll just be the two but unsure if I'll even continue it

# Credits
The resource pack is brought to you by A_VerySaltyPerson
- [Enderman Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul) - [Joo5h](https://modrinth.com/user/Joo5h)
- [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters) & [Ender Zoology](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-zoology) - [Fuzs](https://modrinth.com/user/Fuzs)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries]) - [MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar)
- [The Farlanders](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-farlanders) - [Modding Legacy](https://modrinth.com/organization/modding-legacy)
- [Ender Mail](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-mail) - [Chaosyr](https://modrinth.com/user/Chaosyr)
- [Ender Trigon](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-trigon) - [nonamecrackers2](https://modrinth.com/user/nonamecrackers2)

### Hey, come check this out!
If you would like the Mutant Creeper to match the style of Creeper Overhaul then go check out [shoolepak](https://modrinth.com/user/shoolepak)'s [Mutant Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mutant-creeper-overhaul)
